top_signals.title: NexGold boosts Goldboro drilling as assays lift hopes
top_signals.summary: NexGold Mining expands drilling at Nova Scotia’s Goldboro gold project, lifting shares and resource confidence.

top_signals.title: College of Commissioners meets with the Irish Presidency: “Europe needs to navigate change. Ireland can help chart the course”, says von der Leyen
top_signals.summary:
European Commission News Brussels, 09 Jul 2026 
President of the European Commission, Ursula von der Leyen, led the College of Commissioners to Cork on 2–3 July, the traditional College visit the Commission ...

top_signals.title: Lowry reserves extend Sandfire’s Black Butte copper mine life to 12 years
top_signals.summary: The updated PFS for Black Butte copper in Montana boosts reserves with Lowry, but modest returns temper its US supply potential.

top_signals.title: Devolution may see made-in-Nunavut model
top_signals.summary: Nunavut’s devolution could reshape mining, resource control and royalties as the territory prepares to manage Crown lands, water and permits in 2026.

top_signals.title: USDC issuer Circle wins final approval for US national trust bank charter
top_signals.summary: Circle announces it received final OCC approval for a national trust bank that will initially serve the company and affiliates, with possible future custody services for institutional clients.
